name: Fury of Chen Zhen
overview: Jingwu Chen Zhen is a television series based on the story of Chen Zhen, a fictional student of martial artist Huo Yuanjia. The series is a sequel to the 2008 television series Huo Yuanjia, with Jordan Chan reprising his role as Chen Zhen.

trailers.title: Jing Wu Chen Zhen - Opening Theme Song
